description: Floor speedup to 1.0x minimum and hide time-saved for single-story runs

userStories.description: In crates/baro-tui/src/executor.rs lines 1181-1203: 1) Clamp the speedup to a minimum of 1.0 — if sequential_time/total_time_secs < 1.0, display '1.0x' instead. 2) If there is only 1 story (total_stories == 1), skip the 'Time saved' and 'Speedup' lines entirely from the PR body stats section. Keep the rest of the stats (wall time, files, stories). Ensure no unused variable warnings — remove time_saved_str and speedup variables when they are not emitted, or gate their computation behind the same condition.
userStories.title: Fix speedup in executor.rs PR body

userStories.description: In crates/baro-tui/src/screens/execute_stats.rs lines 149-185: 1) After computing multiplier, clamp it: if multiplier < 1.0, set it to 1.0. 2) If completed_count <= 1, skip the 'Saved:' line entirely (do not push any summary_line for saved time). Currently the else branch on line 175-185 shows '1.0x' — for single story, remove that line too so nothing about savings is shown. Ensure no unused variable warnings.
userStories.title: Fix speedup in execute_stats.rs stats tab

userStories.description: In crates/baro-tui/src/screens/execute_completion.rs lines 34-111: 1) Clamp multiplier to minimum 1.0 — if sequential_time/wall_time < 1.0, use 1.0. 2) If app.total == 1 (single story), skip the 'Time saved:' line entirely from the completion overlay. Currently lines 94-111 conditionally show either the time saved or 'Parallelism: 1.0x' — for single story, omit the entire Line::from block. Ensure no unused variable warnings (saved_secs may become unused when single story).
userStories.title: Fix speedup in execute_completion.rs overlay

userStories.description: Run cargo build (and cargo clippy if available) across the entire workspace to verify there are zero warnings and zero errors after the changes from S1, S2, and S3. Fix any remaining warnings (unused variables, dead code, etc.) that may have been introduced.
userStories.title: Final cargo build zero-warnings check
